plugins.name: loop-spec
plugins.description: Loop-driven development from a spec file (or a prose description) for Claude Code. A six-phase cycle (SPEC/DISCUSS/PLAN/EXECUTE/VERIFY/ITERATE) authors and critiques a spec, plans a task DAG, executes it up a concurrency ladder (subagents, bundled loop-runner fleets, agent teams, workflow DAGs), then a convergence loop judges the result against the original goal and rewinds until converged or out of iteration rounds. Grounded by a required graphify code graph and a probe-before-assert evidence gate; ships simplicity mode, autonomous headless mode, workspace (multi-repo) and greenfield modes, and standalone assess, quality-loop, debug, and intake skills. Full capability inventory in the README.
